bullets: Nearest Shinkansen stop (approx.): Tohoku Shinkansen “Shichinohe-Towada Station”. Confirm details with station and town guides.
From the station to the resort: taxi is typical. Travel time and fare depend on conditions.
If using JR East rail passes, check eligible sections and terms on the official JR site.

faq.notice: Content may change. Also check “Today's operations & snow” for the latest status.

items.question: What is the nearest station?
items.answer: Tohoku Shinkansen Shichinohe-Towada Station is the nearest stop (approx.). Taxis are typical from the station to the resort. Confirm travel time and fare with operators on the day.

items.question: Is there parking?
items.answer: Parking availability, capacity, and fees will be posted after official confirmation. Winter road conditions can affect access.

items.question: Where can I buy lift tickets?
items.answer: Ticket window sales are planned. Confirmed types and prices will be on the Tickets & rental page. Online sales will be announced separately if offered.

items.question: What payment methods are accepted?
items.answer: Cash plus credit card and QR payment availability will be updated after confirmation with the resort.

items.question: When is operations information updated?
items.answer: We post what the resort has verified before opening and during the day. Last updated time appears on the Today's operations page.

items.question: Can the resort close for bad weather?
items.answer: High wind, poor visibility, or snow conditions may cause lift stoppages or trail closures. Check operations before you travel.
